title: Crafting Board
description: Crafting table, but it's a small kitchen board instead of a full carpenter block.
body:
## THIS.. is a crafting board.

**Ok so, let's think about this in terms of the logic of Minecraft.**

**Crafting tables are required to make a lot of food items, meaning realistically you'd have to have one in the kitchen.**

**However, crafting tables don't look like they belong in the kitchen.**

**So, I've decided to add a new variant of the crafting table, and it takes on the appearence of a cutting board.**

**Right clicking it will open up the crafting table menu.**

**Also, there's a parody of the "Minecraft" advancement for picking one up. I called it "Minecraft 2"**

-----

**Made with a crafting table and any wooden slab.**

![Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c43b2acdc6c5a0ef9dbdf7f414e436c525beb705.png)
